heading: Monday Night
text: Mainly clear or becoming so. Lows in the mid to upper 40s west of the Greens, and the mid 30s to lower 40s east, with some lower 30s in the cold spots. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast, except south 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sun filtering through increasing high clouds, mainly west of the Greens. Highs from the mid 60s to around 70 east of the Greens, and upper 60s to mid 70s west. South to southeast winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Lows from upper 30s to mid 40s, some upper 40s in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.
